name: Xi Jinping
role: President of China — BRICS's dominant economic power; primary architect of BRICS+ expansion
quote: We must work together to build BRICS into a primary channel for strengthening solidarity among Global South nations and a vanguard for advancing global governance reform.

name: Vladimir Putin
role: President of Russia — hosted Kazan 2024 summit; drives anti-Western agenda within BRICS
quote: The process of de-dollarization is underway. The enlargement of BRICS is a major milestone — a landmark event in the evolution of the international situation.

name: Narendra Modi
role: Prime Minister of India — BRICS's strategic balancer; chairs 2026 presidency; resists anti-Western framing
quote: We should give a message to the world that BRICS is not a divisive but a public interest group. We must be careful to ensure this organization does not acquire the image of one trying to replace global institutions.

name: Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva
role: President of Brazil — chaired BRICS 2025; positioned Brazil as bridge between Global South and West
quote: Why can't a bloc like BRICS establish a currency for trade? We don't need the dollar to carry out our transactions. It is easier to invest in war than in peace — Brazil chose peace.

name: Cyril Ramaphosa
role: President of South Africa — chaired historic 2023 Johannesburg expansion summit; called it 'BRICS 3.0'
quote: BRICS is neither a geopolitical tool nor an alliance against anyone. It is a platform for countries to come together for economic benefit and to advocate for equitable global governance.

name: Abdel Fattah el-Sisi
role: President of Egypt — led Egypt's accession Jan 2024; advocates BRICS as development finance platform for Africa
quote: Egypt's BRICS membership reinforces our economic diplomacy and affirms our place among the world's major emerging economies, as we champion reform of the global financial structure.

name: Abiy Ahmed
role: Prime Minister of Ethiopia — led Ethiopia's BRICS accession Jan 2024; positions Ethiopia as sub-Saharan Africa's economic hub
quote: BRICS membership strengthens Ethiopia's vision as a major African economic hub and amplifies Africa's voice in global decision-making beyond Western-dominated institutions.

name: Masoud Pezeshkian
role: President of Iran (since Aug 2024) — attended Kazan summit as first BRICS meeting under his presidency; BRICS as counter-sanctions platform
quote: Iran's BRICS membership is a breakthrough against unilateral coercion. We will play an active role in reforming the global financial order and building a just multipolar world.

name: Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan
role: President of the UAE — led UAE's BRICS accession Jan 2024; positions UAE as East-West financial bridge within BRICS
quote: The UAE joins BRICS to reinforce our role as a global trade and financial hub, building partnerships that serve our economic vision and the interests of the Global South.

name: Dilma Rousseff
role: NDB President (since Mar 2023) — first female NDB head; former Brazil president; reelected for second term Mar 2025
quote: The NDB will expand local currency lending, reduce dollar dependency, and champion infrastructure for the Global South on equal footing with existing multilaterals. We will not be subordinate to Western financial politics.

name: Mohammed bin Salman
role: Crown Prince of Saudi Arabia — invited to join BRICS 2023; froze membership bid 2024; key diplomatic swing state
quote: Saudi Arabia evaluates all partnerships based on national interest and our Vision 2030. We engage constructively with all forums — BRICS, G20, and our Western allies — without binding ourselves to any single axis.

name: Javier Milei
role: President of Argentina — declined BRICS membership Dec 2023; vowed Western alignment; case study in ideological BRICS resistance
quote: I will not allow Argentina to align with Communist China or anti-Western blocs. BRICS membership was a mistake incompatible with our path toward freedom and genuine market integration.

name: Sergei Lavrov
role: Russian Foreign Minister — chief diplomat advancing BRICS anti-Western framing; coordinates with China on expansion agenda
quote: The new world order is emerging through BRICS and the Global South. The collective West's era of hegemony is over. Nations are forming their own institutions outside Western control.

name: S. Jaishankar
role: Indian External Affairs Minister — India's strategic voice in BRICS; champions multipolarity without anti-Westernism
quote: India approaches BRICS on its own terms. We believe in multipolarity, but not in creating another bloc. Europe must grow out of the mindset that its problems are the world's problems.

name: Wang Yi
role: Chinese Foreign Minister — key architect of BRICS+ expansion; coordinates China's multilateral BRICS diplomacy
quote: BRICS has grown from a concept to a major platform for Global South cooperation. China remains committed to an open, inclusive, and constructive BRICS that benefits all developing countries.
